name: wishbone_reg_block
core_function: Small Wishbone-compatible register block with address decode, read mux, write strobes, acknowledge, and optional interrupt/status bits.
algorithm: Derive a write-access strobe from cyc, stb, we, and the acknowledge policy. Use a registered ack
structure: Define write access as cyc & stb & we & ack or cyc & stb & we depending on wait-state policy.
Generate ack as a registered one-cycle pulse to avoid combinational bus loops.
Use a case statement for read mux and write decode.
Clear write-one-to-clear command/interrupt bits explicitly after hardware consumes them.
retrieval_text: Small Wishbone-compatible register block with address decode, read mux, write strobes, acknowledge, and optional interrupt/status bits. Derive a write-access strobe from cyc, stb, we, and the acknowledge policy. Use a registered ack Define write access as cyc & stb &
